title: jurinea perula-orientis
intro: Jurinea perula-orientis, also known as Oriental Jurinea, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Jurinea perula-orientis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving immune function, making it a valuable herb in treating various health conditions. Jurinea perula-orientis is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
